form.formComment: Comes off a 39 day let-up. At the latest run 6th of 8 at Geraldton Mdn on February 28 over 1623m, 5 len behind Extra Zero with 58kg at $11. The run before that 10th of 12 at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn on January 25 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind God's Cross with 58kg at $51. Prefer to see him back in form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Comes off a 39 day let-up. At the latest run 6th of 8 at Geraldton Mdn on February 28 over 1623m, 5 len behind Extra Zero with 58kg at $11. The run before that 10th of 12 at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn on January 25 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind God's Cross with 58kg at $51. Prefer to see him back in form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to race keenly and therefore obliged to race wide from the 1000m.
Held up for clear running from on straightening until near the 100m.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 37-day let-up. Most recently 8th of 10 at York on March 2 over 1200m, 5 len behind Superb Vintage carrying 57kg at $21. Before that sat behind the speed prior to fading 10th of 15 at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn on February 22 over 1400m, 6 len behind Tahni Talk with 58kg at $71. Struggling to make a case.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Comes here off a 37-day let-up. Most recently 8th of 10 at York on March 2 over 1200m, 5 len behind Superb Vintage carrying 57kg at $21. Before that sat behind the speed prior to fading 10th of 15 at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn on February 22 over 1400m, 6 len behind Tahni Talk with 58kg at $71. Struggling to make a case.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.
Raced keenly through the early stages.
Bumped on jumping. Over-raced through the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start raced on speed throughout when 2nd of 12 at Northam Mdn on October 5 over 1300m, slow going 2.5 len behind Rubens' Ceiling carrying 56kg at $51. Returned from break led to the turn then faded 9th of 16 at this track Mdn on March 22 over 1300m, 6 len behind Wheely with 57kg at $11. Can't be ruled out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Third race start. Returned from break led to the turn then faded 9th of 16 at this track Mdn on March 22 over 1300m, 6 len behind Wheely with 57kg at $11. Can't be ruled out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted about under pressure in the straight.
Over- raced in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start ran last of 9 at Pinjarra Scarpside 2yo Swp on May 31 over 1000m, slow going 8 len behind Rostislav with 57kg at $21. Went for a break before returning 4th of 11 at Belmont Park Mdn on March 25 over 1000m, 0.6 len behind Joyoh carrying 55kg at $10. Strips fitter and is well-placed to take this out.

Went for a break before returning 4th of 11 at Belmont Park Mdn on March 25 over 1000m, 0.6 len behind Joyoh carrying 55kg at $10. Strips fitter and is well-placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when second last of 11 at Belmont Park Mdn on September 24 over 1200m, 11 len behind King's Drama with 55.5kg at $19. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when second last of 11 at Belmont Park Mdn on September 24 over 1200m, 11 len behind King's Drama with 55.5kg at $19. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when 6th of 9 at Bunbury 3yo Mdn on November 4 over 1200m, 8 len behind Reconnaissance carrying 57kg at $10. Expected to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Resumes from a spell after only one run when 6th of 9 at Bunbury 3yo Mdn on November 4 over 1200m, 8 len behind Reconnaissance carrying 57kg at $10. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: On debut. Three-year-old gelding by War Chant out of Ofcourse She Does. At the most recent trial finished fifth at Lark Hill over 950m. Prefer to see on race day before forming an opinion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). On debut. Three-year-old gelding by War Chant out of Ofcourse She Does. At the most recent trial finished fifth at Lark Hill over 950m. Prefer to see on race day before forming an opinion.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 5th of 11 at Belmont Park Mdn on March 4 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Dancewithme carrying 56kg at $12. Second-up 6th of 11 at Belmont Park Mdn on March 25 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Joyoh with 56kg at $26. Needs to turn form around sharply to be competitive.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Third-up today. First-up 5th of 11 at Belmont Park Mdn on March 4 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Dancewithme carrying 56kg at $12. Second-up 6th of 11 at Belmont Park Mdn on March 25 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Joyoh with 56kg at $26. Needs to turn form around sharply to be competitive.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages. Lay inwards over the final 250m.
Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months in a small field at Belmont Park 3yo 0Mwly on March 25 over 1000m, 4 len behind Eternal Wine with 53.5kg at $4.80. Previously second-up ran last of 11 at Northam Mdn on August 28 over 1100m, on a wet track; 11 len behind Swingman carrying 51.5kg at $31. Fitter and is expected to do much better.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four months break. Finished off last preparation fifth of 9 at Albany Mdn December 4 over 1600m, 2.5 len behind Bagger Prince carrying 52.5kg at $3.10. On debut sixth of 12 at Bunbury Mdn November 4 over 1400m, 7 len behind Pure Silver carrying 54kg at $17. Worth consideration.

form.formComment: Filly by Frosted making her first appearance. Finished fifth in a Lark Hill trial over 950m on March 23. Well held in recent trials but don?t dismiss.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Frosted making her first appearance. Finished fifth in a Lark Hill trial over 950m on March 23. Well held in recent trials but don?t dismiss.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly (All Too Hard - Special Choice) will no doubt benefit from the five trials prior to her debut today. Was third in a Belmont Park barrier trial over 1000m on March 30. Looks tested in this line-up.
